inputs.label: Roof Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of a single roof plane along the eave (horizontal).

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of a single roof plane along the eave (horizontal).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir çatı yüzeyinin saçak boyunca yatay uzunluğu.

inputs.label: Roof Width
inputs.businessContext: Horizontal span from eave to ridge of one roof plane.

businessContext_i18n.en: Horizontal span from eave to ridge of one roof plane.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir çatı yüzeyinin saçaktan mahyaya yatay açıklığı.

inputs.label: Pitch (rise per 12'')
inputs.businessContext: Roof pitch expressed as rise in inches per 12 inches of run (e.g., 4 for a 4/12 pitch).

businessContext_i18n.en: Roof pitch expressed as rise in inches per 12 inches of run (e.g., 4 for a 4/12 pitch).
businessContext_i18n.tr: 12 inç yatay mesafede yükselme miktarı (örneğin 4/12 eğim için 4).

inputs.label: Number of Planes
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical roof planes (e.g., 2 for a standard gable roof).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of identical roof planes (e.g., 2 for a standard gable roof).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Özdeş çatı yüzeylerinin sayısı (örneğin standart beşik çatı için 2).

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of extra material to account for cutting waste and errors.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of extra material to account for cutting waste and errors.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim ve hata payı için ek malzeme yüzdesi.

inputs.label: Bundle Coverage
inputs.businessContext: Area covered by one bundle of shingles (sq ft); typically 33.33 sq ft for 3-bundle squares.

businessContext_i18n.en: Area covered by one bundle of shingles (sq ft); typically 33.33 sq ft for 3-bundle squares.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir paket shingle'ın kapladığı alan (ft²); tipik olarak 3 paketlik kare için 33.33 ft².

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
